meta.title: Spiderdude and the Ghost Chain
meta.teaser: Help Spiderdude stop Skull Rider and save the city!

text: You are in your bedroom reading a comic book.
CRASH! Something hits your window!
What do you do?

commands.response: Your favorite Spiderdude comic! So cool!
You see bright flames lighting up the night sky! Something is happening out there!
You open the window. A tiny spider crawls in carrying a small note!
Maybe look outside first to see what's going on!
You read the note: HELP ME! Meet on the rooftop! -Spiderdude. Wow! Spiderdude needs YOUR help!
You already have lots of comics! Time for a REAL adventure!
You try to pick up the window. Nope! It's stuck to the wall! That's how windows work!
You open the comic and start reading. Spiderdude punches a bad guy. POW! Cool, but you have real stuff to do!
You unfold the little note. It says: HELP ME! Meet on the rooftop! -Spiderdude
What note? You don't have a note yet! Check the window!
A tiny note from the spider! It says: HELP ME! Meet on the rooftop! -Spiderdude. Take it!
You don't see any note. Something crashed into the window though!
What note? You don't see any note yet!

default: Hmm, try looking around your room!
Maybe look out the window?
That's a creative idea! But maybe try the window first.
Your bedroom is messy, but the window is more interesting right now!
You check under your bed. Just dust bunnies and an old sock.
Your teddy bear stares at you. He wants adventure too!

text: You run outside into the street!
Fire trails cover the ground. The air smells like smoke.
Skull Rider was here!

commands.response: The flames glow blue and green. Spooky! They lead down the street.
A scared orange cat hides under a car. Poor kitty!
The cat meows at you sadly. It does not like the fire!
You can see the rooftop of your building. There is a fire escape!
Spiderdude's note says: HELP ME! Meet on the rooftop! You need to get up there!
You climb the fire escape. Up, up, up you go!
You yell at the fire: STOP BURNING! The fire does not listen. Typical fire.
HEY ROOFTOP! ...Nothing. Buildings can't talk, silly!
Walk INTO the fire?! No way! You're brave, not crispy!
The cat is not a place! But it IS very fluffy. Meow!
You look at yourself. Looking good! Now look at something useful!

default: The fire trails are scary! Maybe head up to the rooftop?
Spiderdude is waiting for you on the rooftop!
Nope! That didn't work. Try going to the rooftop!
The street is too hot to hang out here. Head up!
A pigeon walks by. Even the pigeon looks confused.
A car alarm goes BEEP BEEP BEEP! Oops, that wasn't you.

text: Spiderdude is on the rooftop! He looks worried.
The city glows orange with Skull Rider's fire below.

commands.response: Spiderdude says: Skull Rider's fire chain melts my webs! I can't stop him alone. Can you help me find his weakness?
You can see Skull Rider's flames near the park. That's where he went!
Spiderdude's suit has burn marks from the fight. It was tough!
Spiderdude's web shooters! They are so cool!
The note says: Meet on the rooftop! You made it! Talk to Spiderdude.
You show Spiderdude his note. He nods: Thanks for coming, kid! Now let me tell you what happened.
Spiderdude gives you a web shooter! He says: Take this, just in case! Now go check the park!
Maybe talk to Spiderdude first!
You try to pick up Spiderdude. He's a whole person! And very confused! Put him down!
You try to pick up the entire city. It's... it's too big. Way too big. Nice try though!
You talk to the web shooter. Hello web! It says nothing. Webs are not great at conversation.
You shout HELLO at the city! Someone far away shouts HELLO back! Cool!

default: Try talking to Spiderdude! He needs your help!
Spiderdude looks like he has something to tell you.
Don't just stand there! A superhero needs your help!
Spiderdude is tapping his foot. He's waiting for you to talk to him!
The wind blows your hair into your face. Pthhh!
Spiderdude does a backflip while he waits. Show off!

text: The park is smoky. Burnt grass everywhere.
An old lady sits on a bench looking scared.

commands.response: The lady says: You found the key! Now hurry to the library!
The lady says: I saw Skull Rider drop a glowing key near the bench!
The lady says: Skull Rider rode right through here! He dropped a glowing key near the bench!
Just an old park bench. Nothing under it now.
You look under the bench. A glowing purple key! Skull Rider must have dropped it!
Just a park bench. The lady sitting on it looks like she saw something.
You already have the glowing key!
You grab the strange glowing key! It feels cold in your hand.
The sign says: CITY LIBRARY this way!
The old lady looks scared but okay. Maybe talk to her?
You follow the signs to the library. The key glows brighter as you walk!
You should find that key first! The lady said Skull Rider dropped one.
You can't take the lady! That would be VERY rude! She'd bonk you with her purse!
You pull on the bench. HNNNNG! Nope! It's bolted to the ground! And super heavy!
You try to pull the sign out of the ground. It won't budge! It's meant to stay there!
You whisper to the bench. Hey bench. It says nothing. Benches are quiet like that.
You talk to the sign. It says: CITY LIBRARY. That's all it knows how to say!
You talk to the key. It glows a tiny bit. Was that a response? ...Probably not.
You sit on the bench for a second. Comfy! But you have a mission, hero!
You walk to the sign and read it again. CITY LIBRARY. Yep, still says the same thing!
You can't go TO a key! You can take it though!
The glowing purple key in your hand feels cold!
The key sparkles with a purple glow under the bench! Ooooh shiny!
You don't see any key. Maybe someone here knows something?
You can see the library building down the road. It looks old and dusty!
Spiderdude's note. You already found him! Now you're on a mission!
Your web shooter from Spiderdude! It goes THWIP!
THWIP! No no no! Don't web the nice old lady! She'd be so mad!
THWIP! You web the bench. Now it's extra sticky. Why though?
What key? Talk to the lady first. She might know about a key!

default: Maybe talk to the lady? She looks like she saw something.
Look around the park for clues!
The park is a mess! Skull Rider has no manners.
Hmm, that didn't work. Try talking to someone!
A duck waddles past. It quacks at you. QUACK!
You step on a crunchy leaf. Crunch! Satisfying.

text: The old library is quiet and dusty.
One shelf in the back glows with a strange light!

commands.response: The shelf is dark now. You already took the glowing book!
One book on the shelf glows! The title says: Spirits and Chains - A Guide.
You already have the book!
You grab the glowing book. It feels warm!
Which book? There are a million books here! Look at the shelf to find the right one!
The book says: A Skull Rider's power lives in its chain. Break the chain, free the spirit! That's the secret!
You need to take the book first!
A locked door in the back of the library. It has a strange keyhole.
The glowing key fits perfectly! CLICK! The door opens to stairs going down!
The door is locked. You need some kind of key.
You try to pick up the entire shelf. CRASH! Books fall everywhere! Okay bad idea. You put it back. The librarian would be SO mad.
You pull on the door. It's attached to the wall! Doors don't go in your pocket!
Shelves are already open! That's the whole point of shelves! They hold stuff where you can SEE it!
Your glowing book: Spirits and Chains - A Guide. Try opening it!
So many books! There's one about dragons, one about cooking, and one about... socks? Libraries are weird.
The glowing key fits perfectly! CLICK! The door opens to stairs going down!
The glowing purple key hums in your hand. Maybe it opens something here?
Your web shooter from Spiderdude. Save it for later!
Spiderdude's note. It got you into this adventure!
The key doesn't fit anywhere on the shelf.
THWIP! The web sticks to the door but can't pull it open. You need a key!
You poke the key at a book. Nothing happens. Keys open locks, not books!

default: Look around the library! There is something glowing.
Check out that glowing shelf!
Shhh! It's a library! But also look at that glowing thing!
The librarian isn't here. Good thing, because you're about to do some very non-library stuff.
A book falls off a shelf. It was NOT a ghost. Probably.
You sneeze from all the dust. ACHOO! Books fly everywhere!

text: A secret basement under the library!
Old bottles and tools line the walls.
It smells like dust and magic.

commands.response: You have the ice potion safe in your bag!
A blue bottle with a label: ICE POTION - Freezes Ghost Fire. That could be useful!
You have the heavy hammer. It is ready to smash!
A heavy old hammer. It looks very strong!
A piece of ghost chain in a glass case! It glows with cold fire. Just like the book described!
A dark tunnel behind the shelves. It goes deep underground.
You already have the ice potion!
You carefully take the ice potion. Don't drop it!
You already picked up the hammer!
You pick up the heavy hammer. You can do this!
The glass case is sealed shut. You can't take it. But now you know what the chain looks like!
You have the potion and the hammer. Time to go! You squeeze through the tunnel entrance.
You should grab the useful stuff here before going into that dark tunnel!
You try to pick up the tunnel. It's... a hole in the ground. You can't put a hole in your pocket!
You can't go to a chain! What would that even look like? Just look at it!
You can't travel to a hammer! But you CAN take it!
You can't go to a potion! Just pick it up!
You look around in a circle really fast. WHEEE! Okay you're dizzy now.
THWIP! The web sticks to the glass case but can't break it.
You smash the glass case! CRASH! But the ghost chain just phases through your hand. Spooky! At least you know what it looks like.
The key doesn't fit anywhere on the glass case.
The glowing purple key. You used it to open the library door.
Your web shooter! THWIP! Don't waste it. Save it for something important.
Spiderdude's note. It feels like forever ago you read it in your room!

default: Look around! There are useful tools and potions here.
Take what you need before heading into the tunnel!
A secret basement! How cool is this? Grab some stuff!
This place smells funny. Like old socks mixed with magic. Take what you need and let's go!
Something bubbles in a jar. Blub blub blub.
Old cobwebs tickle your face. Bleh!

text: A dark underground tunnel. You can barely see!
You hear water dripping somewhere.
It is very dark in here.

commands.response: The torch burns bright! You can see everything now!
An old torch sits on the wall. But it is too high to reach!
You can barely see a bridge ahead in the darkness.
The torch is already burning bright! No need for more webs.
You aim the web shooter at the torch! THWIP! You pull it down and light it. Now you can see!
With the torch lighting the way, you walk through the tunnel to the bridge!
It is too dark! You need light to go deeper into the tunnel.
The torch is on the wall! You can't walk to a wall decoration!
Your trusty web shooter! Ready to go. THWIP THWIP!
The ice potion. The label says: FREEZES GHOST FIRE. Save it for Skull Rider!
The heavy hammer. You'll need it later!
You throw the hammer at the torch! CLANG! It bounces off the wall and almost hits you! Try the web shooter instead.

default: It is so dark! You need to find some light.
Maybe there is something on the wall that can help?
You bump into a wall. OOF! It's really dark in here!
Was that a bat? No wait, it was just a drip. Find some light!
Drip. Drip. Drip. Water falls on your head.
Was that a bat? Nah, probably just your imagination. Probably.

text: An old stone bridge over an underground river!
Skull Rider's fire marks cover the walls.

commands.response: Strange ghost symbols on the wall. And a drawing of a tall tower!
The bridge is old and cracked but it looks safe to cross.
You can't see the tower from here. But it must be on the other side!
You climb up a bit and peek through a crack. A dark tower in the distance!
You walk across the bridge carefully. It holds! You climb out into the open air!
You try to climb the bridge. That's not how bridges work! You walk ON them, silly!
The tower is way too far away to climb from here! Cross the bridge first!
BONK! You walk straight into the wall. Ouch! Walls are not doors!
You need to cross the bridge first to get to the tower!
THWIP! You web the bridge for extra support. Smart thinking! It feels stronger now.
You smash the wall with the hammer! BOOM! Some rocks fall but nothing useful happens.
The ice potion. Save it for Skull Rider's fire!
The heavy hammer. You'll need it at the tower!
Your trusty web shooter. Ready for action!

default: Try crossing the bridge!
The bridge looks safe enough. Be brave!
The underground river below sounds loud! Just don't look down!
You're so close! Walk across the bridge!
Water rushes below. WHOOOOSH!
The bridge creaks. It's just saying hello!

text: A dark tower rises above you!
Skull Rider's bike is parked by the door.
Flames flicker at the very top.

commands.response: Skull Rider's flaming motorcycle! The engine is off right now.
A heavy metal door. It is very hot! You can't touch it!
The tower is tall and dark. Fire glows at the top. Skull Rider is up there!
You pour the ice potion on the hot door! CRACK! It freezes solid and breaks apart! The way is open!
The door is way too hot to touch! You need to cool it down somehow.
You need to get through the door first!
You don't know how to drive a motorcycle! Plus that one is literally on fire!
CLANG! The hammer bounces off the hot door! Owww your hands sting! You need something COLD!
THWIP! The web melts on the hot door instantly! SIZZLE! You need something cold.
This door has no keyhole. It's sealed by fire!
The ice potion! The label says: FREEZES GHOST FIRE. This could work on the hot door!
The heavy hammer. Save it for something important!
Your web shooter. The door is too hot for webs though.

default: That door is too hot! Maybe you have something to cool it down?
Think about what's in your bag!
OUCH! Everything here is hot! If only you had something cold...
Skull Rider really needs to learn about fire safety.
The motorcycle revs by itself. VROOM! Creepy!
You touch the door. OW! Hot hot hot!

text: Spiral stairs going up!
You hear chains rattling above!
Scorch marks cover every step.

commands.response: The stairs are covered in strong webs! Safe to climb!
The stairs are broken in places. Some steps are missing! It's too dangerous to climb.
The stairs are already fixed with webs! Time to climb!
THWIP! THWIP! You shoot webs across the broken stairs. Now they are strong and safe!
You climb the webbed stairs all the way to the top! Here we go!
The stairs are too broken! Some steps are missing. You need to fix them first.
You try to climb a web like Spiderdude. Nope! You're not a spider, silly! Your shoes get all sticky.
Your trusty web shooter! THWIP! ...Don't waste it! Try it on something useful!
You whack the broken stairs with the hammer! CRACK! Pieces crumble into the darkness. That made it WORSE! You need something stretchy!
The heavy hammer. The stairs need fixing, not smashing!

default: Those stairs look broken! Can you fix them somehow?
You need to make the stairs safe before climbing.
Step, step, HOLE, step... yeah those stairs need work.
Skull Rider really messed up these stairs. Rude!
You hear chains rattling above. Hurry up!
The walls are warm. Skull Rider's fire was here!

text: You reach the top of the tower!
Skull Rider swings his fire chain! WHOOSH!
Spiderdude swings in behind you!
This is it!

commands.response: Skull Rider is big and scary! Fire covers his whole body!
The fire chain swings around fast. Wait... you see a weak spot in the middle! Just like the book said!
Spiderdude says: I'll distract him with my webs! You figure out the chain! I believe in you!
Skull Rider laughs: No one can break my chain! You will never stop me!
Spiderdude is ready to help! He's waiting for your signal.
The hammer feels heavy in your hands. You can do this!
Spiderdude webs Skull Rider's arms! NOW! You run in and SMASH the weak link with the hammer! CRASH! The chain SHATTERS into a thousand pieces!
Not yet! You need to find the chain's weak spot and make sure Spiderdude is ready!
Spiderdude says: No no no, YOU have to do this! I believe in you kid! I'll hold him!
Give something to Skull Rider? Are you CRAZY?! He's the bad guy! He'd just set it on fire!
Give the chain?! It's attached to Skull Rider! And it's on FIRE! No touching!
Give Spiderdude to someone? He's a person, not a gift! Although he IS pretty amazing.
You yell at the chain: BREAK ALREADY! It just keeps swinging. Chains don't speak English.
You whisper to the hammer: We can do this, hammer. I believe in us. The hammer says nothing. But you feel braver!
THWIP! Your web hits Skull Rider but burns up instantly! His fire is too strong for webs alone!
THWIP! The web wraps around the chain but melts right off! The fire is too hot! You need something stronger.
You check the book: Break the chain at its weak spot! Look carefully at the chain to find it!
The book says: A Skull Rider's power lives in its chain. Destroy the chain to free the spirit!
You try the key on the chain. It doesn't work! The chain isn't locked, it's magical!
Your web shooter. Skull Rider is too hot for webs! But Spiderdude can use his own.
Spirits and Chains - A Guide. It says to break the chain at the weak spot!

default: Look carefully at the chain! Remember what the book said?
Talk to Spiderdude to make a plan!
Skull Rider is right there! Focus! Check the chain for a weak spot!
This is the big moment! Look at the chain, talk to Spiderdude, and SMASH!
Skull Rider spins his chain. WHOOSH! Duck!
Fire shoots past your head. Whoa, that was close!

text: The fire goes out! Skull Rider's flames disappear!
A confused man stands where Skull Rider was.
Spiderdude lands next to you with a big thumbs up!

commands.response: Spiderdude high-fives you! He says: You were AMAZING! I never could have figured out the chain puzzle. You are a real hero!
The man says: Thank you so much. That chain had me cursed for years. You freed me!
Spiderdude is smiling under his mask. You can tell!
The man looks tired but happy. He is free from the curse!
Time to go home! What an incredible adventure!
Spiderdude is right next to you! You walk over and he gives you another high five. SLAP! Ow, super strength!
You walk over to the freed man. He smiles and shakes your hand. His hand isn't hot anymore!
You think about home. Your warm bed... your comics... your snacks... Okay maybe time to go home!
You look toward home. Your warm cozy bed is waiting. And probably a snack!
THWIP! You web Spiderdude! He laughs and webs you back! Web fight!
Your web shooter! Spiderdude says you can keep it. Best. Gift. EVER!
The ghost chain book. You used its knowledge to save the city!

default: What an amazing victory! Talk to everyone before heading home.
You did it! You really did it!
You saved the city! Take a moment to enjoy this!
Spiderdude keeps looking at you like you're the coolest kid ever. Because you ARE!
Spiderdude shoots confetti webs! Party time!
You flex your muscles. You ARE a hero!

text: You walk home as the sun rises over the city.
Spiderdude swings by and waves at you!
You smile and wave back.
You are a TRUE HERO!
THE END
default: What an amazing adventure!
The city is safe thanks to you!
Spiderdude swings by and gives you a thumbs up!
Best. Day. Ever!
